CREATE TABLE decimals1 (a Decimal(10, 5), b Decimal(10, 5));
INSERT INTO decimals1 VALUES (toDecimal64(-12, 1), toDecimal32(2.1, 1), (toDecimal64(1234567890, 2), toDecimal64(100000, 2));
SELECT divideDecimal(a, b, 5) AS result_scale_5 FROM decimals1;
SELECT (SELECT divideDecimal(toDecimal64(15, 3), toDecimal64(2, 3), 2) AS subquery_result) + 10 AS combined_result;
CREATE TABLE decimals2 (id Int32, value_a Decimal(10, 5), value_b Decimal(10, 5));
INSERT INTO decimals2 VALUES (1, toDecimal64(12.345, 3), toDecimal64(1.234, 3)), (2, toDecimal64(0.001, 3), toDecimal64(0.002, 3));
SELECT d.id, divideDecimal(d.value_a, d.value_b) AS division_result FROM decimals2 d WHERE d.value_b > 0;
SELECT divideDecimal(a, b) FROM (SELECT toDecimal64(1, 1) AS a, toDecimal64(3, 1) AS b) AS temp;
SELECT divideDecimal(AVG(value_a), SUM(value_b)) AS avg_division_result FROM decimals2;
SELECT d.id, divideDecimal(d.value_a, d.value_b, 5) AS division_with_scale FROM decimals2 d WHERE d.value_a != 0 AND d.value_b != 0;
